name: JSON-only

result.content: {"type":"object","properties":{"title":{"type":"string","description":"Title of the blog post"},"slug":{"type":"string","description":"URL-friendly version of the title"},"tags":{"type":"array","maxItems":5,"items":{"type":"string"},"description":"Tags associated with the blog post"},"published":{"type":"boolean","default":false,"description":"Whether the blog post is published"},"word_count":{"type":"integer","minimum":0,"description":"Number of words in the blog post"}},"required":["title","slug"]}

prompt: Respond with valid JSON only. No markdown fencing, no explanation. Generate a JSON Schema for a blog post with: title (string, required), slug (string, required), tags (array, max 5), published (boolean, default false), word_count (integer, min 0).
